site.tagline: Restoring balance through the Sunnah and professional care.
site.intro: Experience Hijama (Wet Cupping Therapy) in a clean, calm and welcoming environment where traditional practice is combined with modern standards of hygiene and compassionate, client-centred care.

practitioner.heading: Professional, calm and compassionate care
practitioner.bio: Each appointment begins with a personal consultation to discuss your goals, relevant health history and treatment suitability. Treatments are provided in a private women-only setting with careful attention to hygiene, comfort and aftercare.

promotion.title: 20% off for first-time Hijama clients
promotion.description: Available for new clients. Terms may apply.

services.name: Hijama Using Sunnah Points
services.description: Traditional Hijama using appropriate Sunnah points following consultation.

services.name: Upper Back & Shoulders
services.description: A focused session for the upper back and shoulder area.

services.name: Lower Back
services.description: A personalised cupping session focused on the lower back.

services.name: Women’s Health Support
services.description: A respectful and individualised approach supporting general wellbeing.

services.name: Digestive Health Support
services.description: A personalised session planned around comfort and general wellbeing goals.

services.name: Full Body Hijama
services.description: A longer and more comprehensive session discussed during consultation.

testimonials.name: Client testimonial
testimonials.text: Add an approved client testimonial here.

faqs.question: What should I do before my appointment?
faqs.answer: Follow the preparation instructions provided when booking. Contact the practitioner if you have questions about medications, pregnancy, recent surgery or a health condition.

faqs.question: How long can cupping marks last?
faqs.answer: Temporary marks can vary between clients and may remain visible for several days. Aftercare guidance will be provided.

faqs.question: Is Hijama a replacement for medical care?
faqs.answer: No. Hijama is a complementary wellbeing service and does not replace medical diagnosis, treatment or emergency care.

policies.cancellation: Please provide reasonable notice if you need to cancel or reschedule your appointment. The detailed cancellation policy is available through the booking page.
policies.privacy: Personal information collected for enquiries and bookings is handled only for providing and managing services.
policies.disclaimer: Hijama is a complementary wellbeing service and is not a substitute for medical diagnosis, treatment or emergency care. Medical clearance may be requested where appropriate.

quote: The best medicine with which you treat yourselves is Hijama, or it is one of the best of your medicines.
